mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT r.role_id FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.del_flag = '0'
SELECT r.role_key FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.del_flag = '0'

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''
